title: leontonyx squarrosus
intro: Leontonyx squarrosus, also known as Squarrose Prairie Clover, is a perennial legume native to North America. It is used as a medicinal herb due to its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, making it beneficial for treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant's medicinal properties can help alleviate symptoms of digestive disorders, like diarrhea and dyspepsia, and may also have a sedative effect on the nervous system. Herbal preparations of Leontonyx squarrosus often include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments and promote overall health and well-being.
